text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Ardan, Chiyono O. Allow me to express my gratitude for your
cooperation, despite your busy schedules.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Oh, if anything, it is my honor to receive an invitation from you. I'll
make every endeavor to aid you today.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Same here! I'm sure that the progress you make here will teach me a
lot too!
choice_data_list: It's great to have you two!
It's great to have you two!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's been a little while since we started practicing race strategies to
balance the blaze fierce and water still.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today, we're putting the forms to the test in a run with Mejiro Ardan
and Sakura Chiyono O, who both debuted around the same time as
Yaeno Muteki.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Thank you for all your sound advice thus far, Trainer. In this race... I
will show you the fruit of our lessons!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Pant... Pant...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mid-race, Sakura Chiyono O has the lead. The old Yaeno Muteki
would've rushed to the challenge, but...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: (...First, one must account for their lap time.)

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
(I've committed the appropriate speed and pacing to muscle memory.
I'll not let others distract me—and I'll maintain my ideal form!)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Pant... Pant...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Hah!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Ardan makes a move to get into a good position at the corner,
but Yaeno Muteki calmly reads the situation and blocks her.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
(Second, one must study their opponent and anticipate the events of
a race before running it.)

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
...As expected, Ardan is extremely skilled. Even her most minute actions are
calculated to cover for her physical weaknesses, and she executes them
without haste or hesitation.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
(I must visualize how she'll perform, examine every possibility... and
then formulate my response to each.)

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: And now—

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Haaah!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
(All that's left is to let the blaze burn! And burn! And BURN! There's
no need to fear it—just let it combust like an engine, rocketing me
straight to my goal!)

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
(I won't surrender the lead—not to anyone! This victory... will be
MINE!)

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: AAAAAAH!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Yaeno Muteki makes an impressive spurt, surging across the finish line
first.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Pant... Pant...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Blaze fierce and water still... I've balanced them both!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Yaeno. That was most impressive.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Ah! ...Pardon my rudeness, shouting like that before expressing my
gratitude for the run.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: No worries! You were so... so cool just now! I think that was the most intense running I've ever seen from you!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Agreed. Intense, yes... and deeply frightening to witness as a rival. It
seems our generation has much to fear.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Now then. Chiyono O, shall the two of us be off? I believe a
reflection is in order, to ensure we don't lose to Yaeno again.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Ooh, count me in!
You better watch out next time, Yaeno!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
...They make good points. I cannot bear to lose real races either. I'll
need to reflect on this run to seize victory in the Twinkle Series.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: (And to that end...)
choice_data_list: Great job out there! You ran so well!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: ...Trainer. Perfect timing.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Would you accompany me for a bit?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I follow Yaeno Muteki, who leads me to the riverbank where we first
met. She turns to me, and then...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Do you remember the Kongo Yaegaki katas you studied before?
choice_data_list: Huh? Y-yeah, I remember a few.
Huh? Y-yeah, I remember a few.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Excellent. With those forms in mind... I would like you to spar with
me, please.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: ...Whenever you're ready.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I hurriedly get into stance, and—

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Hah! Sei!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Hup! TAAAH!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The exchange is far from a proper sparring bout. My motions are
weak and hesitant, without the sharp, fluid energy Yaeno Muteki has.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But even so... as we trade blows, I start to feel a connection with
her—an unspoken understanding I can't quite explain.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Thank you for the bout!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Did, um... Did you feel what I was trying to show you?

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I don't know how else to articulate it, but I tried to demonstrate
through each strike and each catch...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: I trust you unwaveringly.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Your teachings led me to the balance of blaze fierce and water still.
For future lessons, I would like to officially become your pupil.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Trainer. As master and apprentice... I am eager to study more about
racing under your tutelage!
choice_data_list: I look forward to your growth too!
I look forward to your growth too!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And with that, I'm named Yaeno's official trainer for the Twinkle
Series!
